description_long: This stuffed toy is modeled after the Pokémon character Umbreon, featuring a sleek, quadrupedal body covered in dark black fabric. Its large, upright ears and bushy tail are accented with bright yellow rings, which also appear on its forehead and legs. The toy's eyes are strikingly red, giving it a bold and expressive appearance, while the rest of its face is smooth and rounded. The surface appears soft and plush, typical of stuffed toys, with visible seams outlining the limbs and head. The overall proportions are compact, with a slightly elongated tail and sturdy legs. This toy is likely filled with a lightweight stuffing material, making it easy to carry and cuddle.
description: A soft, plush stuffed toy modeled after Umbreon, with black fabric, yellow ring accents, and vivid red eyes. It has large ears, a bushy tail, and a compact, cuddly form.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing Umbreon's face, red eyes, upright ears, and yellow ring markings on the forehead, ears, and legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the tail, the side profile of the head, and the placement of yellow rings on the body and tail.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the back of the head, both ears, and the tail with yellow bands, as well as the back legs.
description_view_3: Back side view focusing on the tail, rear legs, and the back of the head, with yellow ring details visible on the tail and legs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is intense and focused, with wide, vivid red eyes and a neutral mouth, giving an alert and slightly mysterious look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with the head slightly raised and ears perked up, the tail extended outward.
